channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jannik Sinner and Matteo Berrettini lift Italy past Australia and back to the Davis Cup final
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Top-ranked Jannik Sinner and Matteo Berrettini won matches Saturday in front of a supportive crowd to lift defending champion Italy past Australia 2-0 and back into the Davis Cup final. Sinner extended his tour-level winning streak to 24 singles sets in a row by beating No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shiffrin wins World Cup slalom and takes quest for her 100th victory to North America
item.description: GURGL, Austria (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin is taking the quest for her 100th career World Cup victory to North America.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Big Game: What to know before Stanford visits Cal Memorial Stadium
item.description: Stanford is coming off an upset win over Louisville, while Cal looks to rebound from a disappointing loss to Syracuse.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, Harold Gutmann, The Mercury News

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Caesars Sportsbook senior trader talks F1's explosion in United States
item.description: A Caesars Sportsbook senior trader talked to Fox News Digital about interest in Formula 1 in the United States ahead of the Las Vegas Grand Prix.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angel Yin holes 3 long putts for 2-shot lead in LPGA finale. Nelly Korda shoots 66 to trail by 4
item.description: NAPLES, Fla. (AP) — Angel Yin rammed in a 30-foot par putt on her opening hole, setting the tone for a day of big putts and 3-under 69 that gave her a two-shot lead Friday in the CME Group Tour Championship and the chase for the $4 million prize.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russell puts Mercedes on pole at Las Vegas and Verstappen nips Norris in championship battle
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — George Russell put Mercedes on the pole for the Las Vegas Grand Prix in an upset over teammate Lewis Hamilton, who had been considered the favorite but struggled in Friday night's final qualifying session.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jai'Den Thomas leads No. 23 UNLV to a 27-16 victory over San Jose State
item.description: Jai’Den Thomas ran for 135 yards and the go-ahead touchdown late in the third quarter to help No. 23 UNLV keep its conference title hopes alive with a 27-16 victory over San Jose State.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Austin Hays, Kyle Finnegan, Brendan Rodgers and Jordan Romano among 62 new free agents
item.description: Outfielder Austin Hays, right-hander Kyle Finnegan and second baseman Brendan Rodgers were among 62 players who became free agents when their teams failed to offer 2025 contracts.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Alyssa Nakken, first full-time female coach in MLB history, leaving Giants to join Guardians
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Alyssa Nakken, the first woman to coach in a Major League Baseball game, is leaving the San Francisco Giants to join the Cleveland Guardians. Nakken made history in 2022 when she took over as first-base coach following an ejection.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Antetokounmpo gets triple-double as surging Bucks beat slumping Pacers 129-117 in NBA Cup play
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo had 37 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds for his second triple-double in his last four games, and the Milwaukee Bucks beat the Indiana Pacers 129-117 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 76ers center Joel Embiid sidelined due to swelling in his left knee and will miss two games
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Philadelphia 76ers center Joel Embiid is managing swelling in his left knee and will miss a second consecutive game Sunday, the team said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chase Elliott named NASCAR's most popular driver for 7th straight season
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Chase Elliott was named NASCAR's most popular driver for the seventh consecutive year at the sport's season-ending awards ceremony Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Police recover watch belonging to Travis Kelce in Rhode Island following break-in of his mansion: report
item.description: Authorities reportedly found a watch of Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce's over 1,000 miles away from his home that was broken into last month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Daniel Jones briefly listed on Cowboys' roster; fans clamor for ex-Giant to sign with rival
item.description: Minutes after Daniel Jones was released by the New York Giants, he was somehow listed on the Dallas Cowboys' roster on their official website.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA urges players to remain vigilant about home security measures amid rash of break-ins
item.description: NBA players have been put on high alert after star athletes were victims of home invasions that are believed to have been committed by individuals with tied to international crime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NHL player ruptured testicle after taking puck to groin
item.description: Minnesota Wild player Mats Zuccarello will miss three to four weeks with a ruptured testicle after taking a puck to the groin during a game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lionel Messi's former teammate Javier Mascherano close to becoming Inter Miami coach, AP source says
item.description: Lionel Messi is on the cusp of reuniting with former Argentina national teammate Javier Mascherano with Inter Miami, this time as player and coach, a person with knowledge of the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox call up Colson Montgomery, Juan Carela from minor leagues
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have selected the contracts of shortstop Colson Montgomery and right-handed pitcher Juan Carela, both of whom are highly rated in the organization, to their 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans
item.description: A piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a 34-10 loss to Houston on Monday night, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
